allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('addons keys:', Object.keys\(j.addons\).length\); console.log\('sections:', JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(j\).filter\(k=>!['addons','tabs'].includes\(k\)\)\)\); console.log\('tabs:', j.tabs.length\); j.bar.forEach\(c=>c.items.forEach\(i=>console.log\('  bar:', i.name, '| sizes:', !!i.sizes, '| addons:', i.addons?.length, '| desc:', 'desc' in i, '| detailed:', 'detailed' in i, '| badge:', 'badge' in i\)\)\); j.kitchen.forEach\(c=>c.items.forEach\(i=>console.log\('  kitchen:', i.name, '| priceDisplay:', i.priceDisplay, '| desc:', 'desc' in i, '| badge:', 'badge' in i\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('badges:', Object.keys\(j.badges\)\); console.log\('items:', Object.keys\(j.items\).length\); console.log\('Латте badge:', j.items['Латте'].badge\); console.log\('Эспрессо desc:', j.items['Эспрессо'].desc.substring\(0,50\)\)")
